basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTSAU) Recruitment 2026: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Teaching Associate posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

qualification.details: Teaching Associate (Live Stock & Poultry Management): Essential Qualification: M.V.Sc. Desirable qualification: Ph. D

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for PJTSAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University Recruitment 2026 is Teaching Associate.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Teaching Associate post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for the Teaching Associate position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Associate position is scheduled for 20 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential and desirable qualifications for the Teaching Associate post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is M.V.Sc., and a Ph.D. is considered desirable for the Teaching Associate position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Teaching Associate role ranges from Rs. 49,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Teaching Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment is a Walk-in-interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Jagtial, Telangana, with the pincode 505529. Specific venue details should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
